sourceMovie.title: Riddick
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Riddick works as a science fiction movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The science fiction and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Aliens
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Riddick clicked for you, Aliens (1986) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Riddick clicked for you, Rogue One: A Star Wars Story (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Riddick?
faq.answer: Try Aliens, Rogue One: A Star Wars Story, Edge of Tomorrow—each shares DNA with Riddick while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Riddick?
faq.answer: Riddick (2013) is best described as Science Fiction, Action, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Riddick part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "The Chronicles of Riddick Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
